programme.title: James' Going Places - EP 77
programme.desc: Join James, the host with outstanding culinary skills and an appetite for good food, as he explores markets and savours local delicacies in Taiwan!

programme.title: Evilive - EP 7
programme.desc: The series tells the story of a struggling lawyer Han Dong Soo (Shin Ha Kyun) who gets cases by recklessly visiting prisoners. He meets an absolute villain and transforms into an elite villain himself.

programme.title: Evilive - EP 8
programme.desc: The series tells the story of a struggling lawyer Han Dong Soo (Shin Ha Kyun) who gets cases by recklessly visiting prisoners. He meets an absolute villain and transforms into an elite villain himself.

programme.title: Perfect Match - EP 68
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: Infinity and Beyond 5 - EP 5
programme.desc: Step into a musical journey where singers bridge generations and cultures, reviving classic tunes while championing C-pop globally.

programme.title: Alleys of Flavor, Masters of Life - EP 1

programme.title: Gone with the Rain - EP 24
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Gone with the Rain - EP 25

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 271
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: Hello Mr. Billionaire
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A windfall from the sky! A down-and-out goalkeeper suddenly inherits a massive fortune, but to claim it, he must spend one billion within a month. What follows is a money-burning challenge filled with chaos, comedy, and endless laughs, where spending money becomes the hardest task of all.

programme.title: POV Disekop-Sekop Cogan 34 M Followers
programme.desc: During a fight with El (Cinta Brian), Echa (Zoe Abbas Jackson) accidentally injures Tristan (Kevin Hillers) until he loses consciousness. Panicking, Echa and El think Tristan has died. Echa wants to report to the police, but El insists no one will believe it was an accident. They plan to dispose of the body, but Tristan suddenly regains consciousness. Instead of being angry, he is happy-he was bored with his routine life and had long wanted a vacation.

programme.title: Aura 34 Babe Angels Bikin Hati Semrawut
programme.desc: Mayang (Emilia Samma) berinsiatif untuk menyewa Juleha (Larasati Nugroho) sebagai bodyguard Kevin (Mahdy Reza) setelah Kevin diserang oleh sekelompok pria, tapi Kevin menolaknya mentah-mentah. Menurut Kevin, jika Juleha menjadi bodyguard-nya, apakah hidupnya akan sengsara. Lagi pula baginya, tidak mungkin seorang perempuan menjadi bodyguard. Bagaimana kisah selanjutnya?

programme.title: Hatiku Ganjil Jika Tidak Genap Mencintaimu
programme.desc: Della (Rayna Snova) is constantly urged by her mother to get married, but she is not ready to open her heart after breaking up with Bram (Kevin Hillers). Bram still loves Della, yet Della starts dating Mario, Bram’s coworker who works as a bakery chef. Will Della and Bram reunite?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 131
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ratu Es Cintanya Bikin Shik Shak Shock
programme.desc: Kayla's (Shanice Margaretha) supply of ice cubes melts when her mom cuts the power, leaving Kayla in a quandary. Finally, Kayla goes to a refrigerator in the cafe and without permission puts in her ice cubes.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 585
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 79
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: RESEP MAKNYUS ALA CHEF SYANTIK
programme.desc: Mega, a sales promotion girl at the mall, almost bumped into Dhika, who had just dropped off Cinta, his first love, from shopping. Mega quickly apologized and asked her friend for permission to chase after her cousin, who had run away with her boyfriend to Bandung. She received news that Mega, a sales promotion girl at the mall, almost bumped into Dhika, who had just dropped off Cinta, his first love, from shopping.

programme.title: Cintamu Pedas Bikin Aku Shock, Kamunya Malah Shick Shack Shock
programme.desc: Laras (Soraya Rasyid) is a farmer who takes care of spicy chilies on a daily basis. This is because Laras' family is engaged in chili farming and Laras, who grew up there, really likes spicy. Suddenly Laras's ordinary life, the arrival of a handsome guy named Ryan (Kiki Farrel). But Ryan doesn't like spicy and strangely he insists that he really likes Laras.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 585
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: RAYUAN PEDAS NONA CABE
programme.desc: Since his mother died, Marvin has been living with Agus, his father, and his new brother, Ramon. Since childhood, Marvin has hated Ramon because he always received gifts from Agus while Marvin received punishments, and he never considered Ramon his brother. Eleven years later, Ramon was doing community service at a chili plantation, and one of the farmers was Desi.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 80
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Lu Bijak Sama Gua Sekarang Neng Basreng
programme.desc: The tight schedule of being a famous artist made Tama exhausted while driving so Tama crashed into a basreng vendor. With her kindness even though she was upset Aina (Shanice Margaretha) took Tama (Lavicky Nicholas) to the hospital. After realizing, Tama was surprised why he was in the hospital with an unknown woman. Tama asked Aina not to publicize this case. Suddenly reporters came and asked who Aina was, Tama spontaneously claimed that Aina was his girlfriend.

programme.title: Jalan Kembali: Bohsia 2
programme.desc: Empat sekawan cuba mematahkan rancangan seorang lelaki yang cuba merosakkan gadis-gadis jalanan dengan membawa mereka ke jalan yang haram.

programme.title: Halal Maps - EP 13
programme.desc: Menampilkan sajian kulinari seluruh dunia, Halal Maps menemui penduduk tempatan yang berkongsi hidangan Halal kegemaran di bandar mereka, di mana mendapatkannya dan bagaimana menuju ke sana.

programme.title: Siapa Jaga Mak? - EP 3
programme.desc: Diilhamkan oleh kisah-kisah pengasuh yang benar, Siapa Jaga Mak ceritakan tentang empat keluarga yang menghadapi pelbagai emosi daripada penjagaan orang tua.

programme.title: Survival 486
programme.desc: Syuhada pergi mendaki ke Gunung Tahan bersama kawan-kawannya. Malangnya, dia tersesat dan jatuh ke dalam lubang yang dalam dan terperangkap di sana selama 19 hari.

programme.title: Pernikahan Palsu - EP 5
programme.desc: Sehari sebelum hari perkahwinannya dengan Aji, Nila mengalami kemalangan dan hilang penglihatan. Aji membatalkan perkahwinan itu. Galang yang tidak sanggup melihat Nila, terdesak untuk melamar Nila.

programme.title: Harta Dalam Stor - EP 5
programme.desc: Ikuti hos Nabil Mahir dan Azhar Sulaiman menerjah stor kediaman selebriti tanahair untuk mencari barang-barang yang boleh digunapakai dan dijual.

programme.title: Kak Kek Ke Kelate - EP 6
programme.desc: Kak Kek, alter ego Catriona Ross akan menjelajah ke Kelantan untuk mencari makanan viral di Kelantan di samping membawa penonton meneroka keunikan dan tempat menarik yang ada.

programme.title: Casa Liburan - EP 2
programme.desc: Pengacara akan membawa penonton meneroka rumah-rumah mewah yang unik dan menarik milik hartawan di Malaysia.

programme.title: Curi-Curi Cuti - EP 12
programme.desc: Saksikan Kamal Adli sebagai hos membawa selebriti bercuti bersama peminatnya dalam Curi-Curi Cuti di bawah kempen #expeRIAnce.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 10
programme.desc: Diana berterima kasih kepada Qistina kerana kehadirannya telah membuat Luqman semakin bahagia. Akibat berlaku salah faham, kekecohan berlaku antara Hadi dan Benjamin.

programme.title: Juara Joran - EP 14
programme.desc: Rancangan realiti yang melibatkan seorang pemancing dan seorang artis dalam satu pasukan. Mereka akan bersaing melalui cabaran ketahanan fizikal, mental, bakat memancing dan memasak.

programme.title: My Buskers - EP 7

programme.title: Check In : Cinta - EP 1
programme.desc: Check in Cinta menyingkap kehidupan romantis dan manja para selebriti di sebalik dunia glamor. Mereka berkongsi pengalaman berkenalan sebelum bergelar pasangan suami isteri yang mungkin ramai tidak tahu.

programme.title: Lelaki Macam Dia - EP 7

programme.title: Agent Vinod
programme.desc: RAW agent Vinod travels across nations to learn who killed Rajan and why a nuclear suitcase sparked chaos, exposing a global conspiracy that ends in London. Release Year: 2012 Director: Sriram Raghavan

programme.title: Forensic
programme.desc: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds. Release Year: 2022 Director: Vishal Furia

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Chulbul Pandey, a fearless yet reckless cop, angers a corrupt politician by killing his brother, leading to brutal revenge that drives him into a fight for justice. Release Year: 2012 Director: Arbaaz Khan Awards: 2013 Winner Popular Award for Best Actor - Salman Khan

programme.title: Kakuda
programme.desc: Haunted by a village curse predicting her husband's death in thirteen days, a newlywed bride seeks a ghost hunter's help to save the man she loves desperately tonight. Release Year: 2024 Director: Aditya Sarpotdar

programme.title: Waqt: The Race Against Time
programme.desc: Patriarch Ishwar Chandra Thakur's peaceful life shatters when his lazy son Adiya marries an enemy's daughter, forcing Ishwar to teach him hard lessons about struggle and survival. Release Year: 2005 Director: Yash Chopra

programme.title: Dream Girl
programme.desc: Karamveer gains fame by posing as a woman on a call centre job, but obsessive callers turn his secret into chaos, dragging him into trouble that threatens his real identity. Release Year: 2019 Director: Raaj Shaandilyaa

programme.title: Ghayal
programme.desc: Framed for his brother's murder by Balwant Rai, Ajay survives prison with three allies, planning a daring revenge that will expose the truth and bring down the powerful villain. Release Year: 1990 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi Awards: Best Film: Dharamendra, Best Actor: Sunny Deol, Best Director: Rajkumar Santoshi, Best Story Writer: Rajkumar Santoshi, Best Editor Filmfare Awards

programme.title: No Entry
programme.desc: A loyal friend helps a victim escape a cruel marriage by introducing her to a dancer, setting off a chain of comic misunderstandings, emotional twists, and surprising revelations. Release Year: 2005 Director: Anees Bazmee Awards: 2006 Nominee Filmfare Award Best Film

programme.title: Chor Machaye Shor
programme.desc: A clever thief disguises himself as a cop to recover his stolen diamond from police headquarters, gaining the ACP's trust while a sharp colleague grows suspicious of him. Release Year: 2002 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Gangaajal
programme.desc: IPS Amit Kumar is posted to a lawless town and battles corrupt cops and brutal criminals, standing firm against danger to restore justice and order. Release Year: 2003 Director: Prakash Jha Awards: Best Screenplay Prakash Jha

programme.title: Littoral
programme.desc: A magazine about the people of the sea. An invitation to set sail for a programme rich in voyages, discoveries and fascinating encounters with those for whom the sea is their life, the ocean-lovers and the high-seas adventurers.

programme.title: Bestioles & Cie - EP 23
programme.desc: Whether it's a lake, tree or field, there are always a host of mini-creatures. Often feared, because unknown, we discover just how fascinating they are as we take an immersive visit into their world. Often, and wrongly, underestimated, they play an essential role in the natural cycle of life.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles - EP 34
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Le Petit Geek - EP 21
programme.desc: What exactly does an influencer do? How do you create a video game? Why are screens dangerous, and what about digital identities? In each episode children shed light on today's virtual world.

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 12
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Les Croquemoutard - EP 49
programme.desc: The Kiddycrunchers are a family of Trolls who have been forced to leave their home under the bridge and move into the Shoebox Housing Project to Iive amongst human beings! They discover community life and find that it isn't easy to live amongst these scrumptious creatures with their odd ways!

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place

programme.title: Movie - Karuppan
programme.desc: Anbu is forced to marry Karuppan after he tames her brother's bull in Jallikattu. Kathir, who is secretly in love with Anbu, plots to separate her from her husband.

programme.title: Movie - Demonte Colony
programme.desc: After consuming liquor, four friends decide to do something interesting and visit a haunted bungalow. However, they do not realise that they have returned home with an evil spirit.

programme.title: Movie - Thondan
programme.desc: Jeeva, an uneducated driver, cannot tolerate child labour and fights to eliminate it. When Subha witnesses a murder and is in danger, Jeeva comes to her rescue.

programme.title: Movie - Chinnamani
programme.desc: For years, Duraisamy Thevar's mother has tried to force him to get married, but he does not listen. Finally, when he decides to marry Chinna Mani, a widow, his family is shocked as she is supposedly unlucky.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Vanakkam Chennai
programme.desc: After being cheated by Narayanan, a house agent, Ajay and Anjali end up sharing the same apartment. Love blossoms between the two while they attempt to nab Narayanan and part ways.

programme.title: Movie - Sayra Narasimma Reddy
programme.desc: Ten years before the Sepoy Mutiny, Emperor Uyyalawada Narasimha Reddy of the Rayalaseema region fights the British East India Company in order to put an end to their atrocities.

programme.title: Movie - Sandakozhi
programme.desc: Balu, on a visit to his friend's hometown, falls for the latter's sister Hema. When he learns that the area is ruled by a local gangster Kasi, Balu teaches him a lesson.

programme.title: Movie - Vaathi
programme.desc: Assigned to a government school as a teacher, a young professor encounters several obstacles in his fight against people trying to turn the sacred pillar of education into a business.

programme.title: Movie - Natpe Thunai
programme.desc: Prabhakaran, a former hockey player, helps a local team save their ground by training them to win a match against the Pondicherry team. However, a corrupt politician has his eyes set on the ground.

programme.title: Movie - Kaadhal Sadugudu
programme.desc: Chitambaram doesn't want his daughter Kausalya to marry Suresh. Suresh then decides not to marry Kausalya without her father's permission. Finally, Chitambaram relents and the lovers reunite.

programme.title: Movie - Karisakkaattu Poove
programme.desc: Pounraasu, who is secretly in love with Nagamani, chooses to remain silent when her marriage is fixed with his elder brother since he does not want to come in the way of his elder brother's happiness.

programme.title: Movie - Kaama Rasu
programme.desc: Kamarasu takes the blame to save Srividhya's daughter to whom he is indebted. Things take a turn when Kamarasu falls in love with Vasanthi, but she suddenly dies.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Asathal
programme.desc: Vetri leads a carefree life with his two best friends. When an unknown woman dies leaving behind her baby, Vetri claims in court that he is the father to avoid marriage and puts himself in trouble.

programme.title: Movie - Thai Mel Aanai (New)
programme.desc: Raja, a young man, is determined to avenge the death of his mother and sister. But his friend, a law-abiding police officer, does not want Raja to take the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Movie - Per Sollum Pillai
programme.desc: Rajalakshmi raises Ramu, an orphan, as her own son who in turn always protects his foster family. However, he must stop his malicious foster brothers from marrying off their real sister to a gangster.

programme.title: Movie - Sundara Purushan
programme.desc: A young man returns home years after he ran away. He tries to win over his childhood love, but she is in love with someone else. His brother implicates the girl's lover in a murder and sends him to jail.

programme.title: Movie - Arasu
programme.desc: Thirunavukkarasu, a gentle soul, takes up the job of handling the temple accounts in Agraharam. Soon, he shows his true identity and seeks revenge against a dangerous criminal who is out of jail.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 - EP 17
programme.desc: Liverpool and Spain star Luis Garcia selects his ultimate Premier League eleven, choosing from the best players he played alongside in England. Drawing on his experiences at Anfield and on the international stage, Garcia reflects on the talent, skill, and personalities that made his list. With insight, anecdotes and tough decisions, he builds his dream team from his unforgettable years in the Premier League.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 31
programme.desc: This week, The Big Interview sits down with Newcastle United's Malick Thiaw to discuss his journey to the Premier League. Growing up in Dusseldorf within a multicultural family, the German International reflects on his early life and the role models that shaped him. Rising through the academy systems of various Bundesliga clubs, Thiaw made his mark at Schalke 04 before donning the famous Rossoneri shirt of AC Milan where he won the Supercoppa Italiana in 2025.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 29
programme.desc: Michael Kayode's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. After spending seven years in the Juventus academy, Kayode moved to Gozzano in Serie D. A breakout campaign saw the then 16-year-old play a big part in Gozzano's title win and promotion. His form soon caught the attention of Fiorentina, where he made his Serie A debut and played in back-to-back UEFA Conference League finals.

programme.title: Burnley vs Bournemouth (MW30) (Live) - EP 292
programme.desc: Only Manchester United’s Premier League games have seen more goals (91) than Bournemouth’s this season (90, level with Burnley). Despite this, no side has had more 0-0 draws than the Cherries this term (4).

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26 - EP 15
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League’s first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Newcastle United (MW30) (Live) - EP 295
programme.desc: Chelsea have won 11 of their last 12 Premier League home games against Newcastle (D1) since a 2-0 loss in May 2012 under Roberto Di Matteo.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26 - EP 41
programme.desc: We shine a spotlight on Unai Emery, tracing the journey of one of Europe’s most meticulous and innovative coaches from his roots in Spain to the pinnacle of the Premier League. Through exclusive interviews with his brother and the coaches who guided him in his early years, we uncover the dedication, detail and relentless drive that shaped his rise in the game.

programme.title: PL GOATs 2025/26 - EP 2
programme.desc: Italy has provided some of the greatest players to ever grace the Premier League. This week, we sit down with two Italian legends, Roberto Di Matteo and Gianfranco Zola to discuss the indelible mark of Italian players on the Premier League, and debate who are their greatest Italian players in league history.

programme.title: Burnley vs Bournemouth (MW30) - EP 292
programme.desc: Only Manchester United’s Premier League games have seen more goals (91) than Bournemouth’s this season (90, level with Burnley). Despite this, no side has had more 0-0 draws than the Cherries this term (4).

programme.title: Sunderland vs Brighton and Hove Albion (MW30) - EP 294
programme.desc: Sunderland are hosting Brighton in a league match for the first time since October 2004 (a 2-0 win in the Championship), and for the first time in the top-flight since a 1-1 draw in April 1983.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Everton (MW30) - EP 296
programme.desc: Arsenal are unbeaten in their last six Premier League games against Everton (W4 D2), having lost four of their previous five against them (W1).

programme.desc: Chelsea have won 11 of their last 12 Premier League home games against Newcastle (D1) since a 2-0 loss in May 2012 under Roberto Di Matteo.

programme.desc: West Ham United are winless in 20 Premier League matches against Manchester City (D3 L17), since a 2-1 win in September 2015. It’s their longest ever winless league run against an opponent.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26 - EP 31
programme.desc: This week, The Big Interview sits down with Newcastle United's Malick Thiaw to discuss his journey to the Premier League. Growing up in Dusseldorf within a multicultural family, the German International reflects on his early life and the role models that shaped him. Rising through the academy systems of various Bundesliga clubs, Thiaw made his mark at Schalke 04 before donning the famous Rossoneri shirt of AC Milan where he won the Supercoppa Italiana in 2025.

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26 - EP 15
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League’s first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Manchester City (MW30) - EP 291
programme.desc: West Ham United are winless in 20 Premier League matches against Manchester City (D3 L17), since a 2-1 win in September 2015. It’s their longest ever winless league run against an opponent.

programme.title: FS MMA Tara LaRosa vs. Amanda Buckner
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Amanda Buckner and Tara LaRosa are two of the world's best female fighters. Both are highly trained in Brazilian jiu-jitsu, Judo and Muay Thai, watch them face off in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Timothy Bradley vs. Devon Alexander
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a battle of unbeaten junior welterweights to unify the WBC and WBO world titles as Timothy Bradley, aka 'Desert Storm', (26-0, 11 KOs) faces Devon Alexander 'The Great' (21-1, 13 KOs). This fight took place at the Silverdome in Pontiac, Michigan, USA on January 29, 2011.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 6: Bandung, Indonesia - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Pencak Silat and the Martial Art of Hands, Feet, Throws and Weapons featuring Masters Rita Suwanda and Dadang Gunawan.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Arturo Gatti vs. Carlos Baldomir
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a welterweight world championship contest featuring Arturo Gatti and Carlos Baldomir. Baldomir looks to continue his rise in the welterweight ranks. Also on the card, a classic welterweight title brawl between Andre Berto and Victor Ortiz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 featuring Shodai, Aoiyama, Takagenji and Hakuho from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights James Kirkland vs. Alfredo Angulo
programme.desc: This episode features James Kirkland as he faces Alfredo Angulo in an explosive, hard-hitting fight, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: FS MMA Tara LaRosa vs. Amanda Buckner
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Amanda Buckner and Tara LaRosa are two of the world's best female fighters. Both are highly trained in Brazilian jiu-jitsu, Judo and Muay Thai, watch them face off in Costa Rica.

programme.title: WCCB Live (Live)
programme.desc: Boxing legend Mike Tyson returns to the grassroots of the sport with the launch of the Mike Tyson Invitational, an amateur boxing showcase designed to spotlight elite amateur fighters, develop the next generation of American boxing talent and reinforce the values of discipline, mentorshiop and opportunity that define the sport at its best.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Erislandy Lara
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a welterweight bout between former champion Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-2, 27 KOs) and up and comer Erislandy Lara, aka 'The American Dream", 15-0, 10 KOs). The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 9, 2011.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championships as well as Girl's Weapons, Synchronized Team Forms and Boy's and Girl's Traditional Weapons.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light welterweight title unification bout between Amir Khan and Danny Garcia. Also on the card, former heavyweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Kakuryu, Endo, Mitakeumi and Hakuho from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: A qualifying round in Pittsburgh's Carrie Furnace features the Snake Crossing and Wind Chimes obstacles.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Garreth McLellan vs. Brendan Lesar
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the interim Middleweight Championship as Garreth 'SoldierBoy' McLellan and Brendan 'Descendant' Lesar meet in the hexagon. Bonus coverage includes Matunga Djikasa vs. Ivan Strydom and Devon Cronje vs. Guy Mongambi.

Show 5 featuring Kakuryu, Endo, Mitakeumi and Hakuho from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: A qualifying round in Pittsburgh's Carrie Furnace features the Snake Crossing and Wind Chimes obstacles.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Garreth McLellan vs. Brendan Lesar
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the interim Middleweight Championship as Garreth 'SoldierBoy' McLellan and Brendan 'Descendant' Lesar meet in the hexagon. Bonus coverage includes Matunga Djikasa vs. Ivan Strydom and Devon Cronje vs. Guy Mongambi.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Erislandy Lara
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a welterweight bout between former champion Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-2, 27 KOs) and up and comer Erislandy Lara, aka 'The American Dream", 15-0, 10 KOs). The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 9, 2011.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championships as well as Girl's Weapons, Synchronized Team Forms and Boy's and Girl's Traditional Weapons.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light welterweight title unification bout between Amir Khan and Danny Garcia. Also on the card, former heavyweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Edison Miranda vs. Willie Gibbs
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Super Middleweights Edison Miranda (26-2, 23 KOs) vs. Willie 'The Gladiator' Gibbs (20-1, 16 KOs) from the Miccosukee Indian Gaming Resort in Miami, Florida, USA. Bonus coverage includes Jason Litzau, aka 'The American Boy' (20-1, 18 KOs) vs. Jose Hernandez (21-3, 13 KOs).

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jermain Taylor vs. Jeff Lacy
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former Middleweight Champion Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-2, 17 KOs) in a back and forth battle with Jeff "Left Hook' Lacy (24-1, 17 KOs) in a WBC Super Middleweight Title Eliminator on November 15, 2008 from the Vanderbilt University Memorial Gymnasium in Nashville, Tennessee, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Ekaterinburg, speak with number 1 ranked fighter Khasan Khalmurzaev about his return to Judo, and show Soichi Hashimoto's success using his signature throw.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on the martial art of breaking and how the techniques are fine-tuned with technology.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Jose Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Saul (Canelo) Alvarez defending his NABF welterweight title against Jose Miguel Cotto, Alvarez's final bout before rising through the ranks and championships of the WBC. Also on the card, a heavyweight kickboxing clash between Errol Zimmerman vs. Rico Verhoeven.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Goeido, Ichinojo, Daieisho and Kotoeko from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Matthew Macklin
programme.desc: This episode features an undisputed middleweight title fight between Sergio Martinez and Matthew Macklin, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 33
programme.desc: Whilst helping Duggee clean up, the Squirrels come across an old lamp. Duggee explains that many years ago, when rubbed, it could grant three magical wishes.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 32
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about atoms, molecules and cells to help understand sizing when they try to sort a line-up of things from smallest to biggest.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 31
programme.desc: The Squirrels are getting ready for the same woodland adventure, but their mornings all look slightly different.

programme.desc: Xuli and Glitch go head to head as they try to beat the Go Jet Academy land speed record.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: Glitch gets into a mountain of trouble as the Go Jetters attempt to climb the Matterhorn.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 11
programme.desc: Sonny returns to Sodor to try to be a really useful engine again but some of the other trains aren't willing to give him a second chance.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 30
programme.desc: Music Lady needs Sarah & Duck's help to return a music-loving stowaway back to the Cloud Tower.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 32
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck are excited to visit the observatory to see a passing comet.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Stanley must keep Myrtle's pumpkin safe from Speedy the snail. He builds a series of obstacles and defences to protect it from the tenacious Speedy who tests Stanley's ingenuity.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Stanley, Sophie and Benjamin make up a new game, 'Dino-Pirates'. This is such a good game, they use it as inspiration for Stanley's carnival float.

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: A series exploring maths in everyday scenarios. With catchy songs and fun animation.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: JoJo's excited to go on her first camping trip with Gran Gran, Cousin Lexi and Uncle Tyrell. It'll be JoJo's first time sleeping outside, and there's lots to find out about camping.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 14
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 16
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 20
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 19
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits theatre, it's Corn singing an A-maiz-ing Counting Song about his remarkably organised kernel rows.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 18
programme.desc: Evil Pea takes all the books from the Supermarket. Supertato, Chilli and Carrot try to rescue all the books by using acrobatic skills they learnt from their favourite circus book.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 19
programme.desc: Supertato gets hiccups while Evil Pea is firing jam at Tato Tower. Supertato harnesses the power of his hiccups to save Tato Tower from Evil Pea's jam attack.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 61
programme.desc: The Teletubbies accidentally leave the Tiddlytubbies' gate open and some of them escape into Home Dome. The Teletubbies must find them all and then close the gate.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'cloud' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We explore rain clouds, snow clouds, funny clouds and someone even dresses up as a cloud!

programme.desc: Messy wants to run further, but he keeps getting out of breath. Will he be able to take on the Great OKIDO Challenge and race to the finish line?

programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

Jackal and Spider stole the feathers from Ostrich's neck and legs until she looked like a very big plucked chicken! The next day Ostrich was mortified and stuck her head in the ground so that Lion couldn't see her.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 28

programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 21

But when Kit realizes she accidentally scratched up Frank and Beans’s tree, she, Tag and Scooch find a way to make it up to them.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 22

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 21

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: When Phoebe convinces the Tooth Fairy to visit before Marcus has actually lost his tooth, the Dew Drops do everything in their power to make sure the tooth is out before she arrives! / The Dews decide to hold a concert in the park for their animal friends, but can’t find the time to practice.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: When Rodney draws and writes his own comic book, TZG secretly helps him transport it to the comic book store where creator Ken KaBlam is on the hunt for new talent. / When Ken KaBlam gets homesick for his own hometown of Crostonburg, TZG secretly recreates the things me misses in Harmony Harbor.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: When Donna is dog sitting but unable to sleep due to barking, TZG secretly stops a skunk from sneaking into her yard at night and riling the pooch. / When an inexperienced Rona takes over as chairman of the Founder’s Day Celebration, TZG secretly helps ensure the traditional festivities run smoothly.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - EP 33
programme.desc: Throughout history, many have claimed to be able to see into the future and changed the course of history. But what did their prophecies reveal? And what predictions did they make for the future?

programme.title: The Pickers (S18) - EP 327
programme.desc: A retired Air Force general reveals the story of his American Dream. Meanwhile, Robbie and Danielle are dazzled by the glow of a rare collection of radioactive glass.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: From Lionel Trains to video games, for the right collector, our childhood toys can be worth millions! Over the last decades, people have paid some truly outrageous prices for the toys they always wanted.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: For six decades two silly but savvy entrepreneurs-S.S. Adams and H. Fishlove-turned their love of a good joke into a booming prank toy industry. Their rivalry produced hundreds of tricks and gags.

programme.title: How Disney Built America - EP 1
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 35
programme.desc: A Georgia diner owner discovers the chicken game when he creates a unique fried chicken sandwich with cast-off filets. The sandwich becomes the menu centrepiece at one of the most popular fast food chains.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek: Borneo (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Jaime gets close to sharks as she dives off Sabah's east coast. Back on the mainland, she rides to Sabah's famous orangutan sanctuary where she discovers some unexpected guests have moved in!

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson - EP 1
programme.desc: 18-year-old Nicole Brown meets 30-year-old OJ Simpson while working as a hostess, sparking a whirlwind romance. Despite appearing as the perfect wife and mother, Nicole endures OJ's abuse in private.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9) - EP 11
programme.desc: A deadly church bombing stuns a small Illinois county, sending law enforcement scrambling for answers. Then it happens again.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Elizabeth Thomas Story with Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: Five years after she was groomed and abducted by the most popular teacher in school, Elizabeth Thomas shares new revelations about her ordeal, with famed kidnapping survivor Elizabeth Smart.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 527
programme.desc: After an argument in his home, a man answers a knock at his front door and is suddenly shot and killed.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks - EP 3
programme.desc: When teens Llianna Adank and Eric Goldstrand are found shot to death at an Oregon park in 1977, every parent's nightmare comes true.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2) - EP 6
programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, one man is struggling to feed his kids while another is surprised to find he owes child support. A woman is indignant to learn she's been arrested for getting drunk in a bar.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6) - EP 2
programme.desc: 10-year-old Karen Pedley was hailed a hero when she saved her family from a fire. That event triggered a lifelong obsession, one which would lead to her setting alight the nursing home where she worked.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5) - EP 145
programme.desc: A domestic violence defendant loses his temper during a virtual hearing; grieving parents speak directly to their sons' killer; a judge has strong words for a teen arsonist; and more.

programme.desc: When a Mobile mother of four is shot just blocks from her home, detectives look to her loved ones to identify her killer. But, at trial, his attorneys claim he acted in self-defence.

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 3

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3) - EP 6

programme.desc: Charming and smart, Henry tried to hide his dark side, fuelled by years of abuse and twisted fantasies, until his first murder. Then, bad Henry took over.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Companion piece to the movie Black Girl Missing. While the media goes into a frenzy over missing white girls, Black women's disappearances receive muted coverage and limited police resources.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel - EP 5
programme.desc: August 29, 2006, Riverside County, CA. Deputies from the Riverside County Sheriff's Department respond to the scene of an abandoned vehicle in a remote area of the Gavilan Hills.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence - EP 6
programme.desc: A love triangle at the University of Florida results in the murder of a popular student. An undeniable digital trail leads straight to his murderer.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Joshua Aide, a former Marine, is on trial for the murder of his ex-girlfriend's father, as well as her attempted murder and that of a family friend. He claims he was ambushed by the three.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 13

The chefs work in teams and battle it out head-to head in this 5 round cook-off for a special group of young judges.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: CNBC On Assignment
programme.desc: CNBC goes on assignment at the biggest events around the world, bringing you interviews and insight from the most influential leaders in business, politics, activism and the arts.

programme.title: The Tech Download
programme.desc: Hosted by Arjun Kharpal and Steve Kovach, CNBC's "Tech Download" podcast cuts through the noise to unpack the technology stories that matter most. With access to industry leaders and years of experience covering the biggest tech news, Arjun and Steve deliver sharp analysis and compelling narratives on the trends, risks and innovations shaping tech.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: "American Greed" goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, "CNBC Meets" is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America’s top CEOs, CNBC’s Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it. In Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: This is the story of how an Arizona woman's house became a gateway for North Korea's IT operatives - an underground "laptop farm" that infiltrated US companies and pumped millions to the regime.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: This is the tale of Brazil's largest bank robbery. At the heart of this crime is South America's most dangerous mafia and a daring heist which took place on what's now known as the "Night of Terror".

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft. Instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and "accepted wisdom" to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, the Agenda quite simply sets the agenda. You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Talk Africa
programme.desc: Talk Africa is a weekly discussion show that brings the most influential voices in Africa to the world. Broadcast from CGTN’s production center in the Kenyan capital, Nairobi, Talk Africa looks at Africa and the world from an African perspective.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. programme.title: Asia Today

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. programme.title: Rokkaku Seiji's Nomitetsu Railroad Trip: Northern Line, State Railway of Thailand Part 1
programme.desc: An actor Rokkaku Seiji, who loves both train and liquor, travels around Japan by rail. He stops over at stations he likes and explores the streets. Enjoy the fun-filled railroad trip with the music he selects!

programme.title: Japanese Entertainment Encyclopedia
programme.desc: Discover the magnetism of charismatic Japanese entertainers.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: Go! Go! Cook R'n
programme.desc: A dietary education program introducing tips for cooking and knowledge of ingredients while enjoying singing and dancing with humorous animation.

programme.title: Nyan-chu! Space! Broadcasting!
programme.desc: Nyan-chu, a cat from the earth, introduces human lives and cultures to the aliens in outer space.

programme.title: With Mother (R)
programme.desc: This children's program includes a puppet show, cartoon, music, and gymnastics in which children can participate.

programme.title: no art, no life
programme.desc: Self-taught artists are gaining respect globally. In Japan, such artists are making career-defining works, but few art fans or curators know them.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Ghost Writer's Wife" Week 23 (R)
programme.desc: The 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn also known as Koizumi Yakumo, portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. At its heart is a woman captivated by ghost stories and her foreign-born husband. Together, they share a life that seems ordinary yet delightfully odd.

programme.title: NHK Special "Blowing in the Wind: Phones for Heart-to-Heart Connections" (R)
programme.desc: A telephone booth known as the "Phone of the Wind" stands on a hill in northern Japan. It is not connected, but many people come here to "call" their loved ones lost in the 2011 tsunami.

programme.title: Project X: The Challengers-New Beginnings "FM Iwaki's 3.11" (R)
programme.desc: Project X returns for the first time in 18 years. The former series featured people involved in project related to the Japanese industry and contemporary history. The new series focuses on people in the "Lost Era" following the collapse of the bubble economy. In every era, there are always those take on challenges. Even without receiving praise or being in the spotlight, some dedicate themselves to their work. The documentary delivers passion and courage right to you.

programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: Natural Grandeur of the East
programme.desc: Enjoy the Japanese natural beauties and the many creatures which habitat there and discover the irreplaceable importance of nature.

programme.title: 100 Letters to the Future 2026: Children's Stories from the Disaster Area
programme.desc: Six months after the Great East Japan Earthquake, one hundred children from the affected areas recorded video letters capturing life in temporary housing, memories of lost family members, disrupted schooling, and their feelings toward hometowns turned into evacuation zones. Fifteen years on, the program revisits them to see what those who experienced the disaster at such formative ages think and feel today, tracing their journey into adulthood.

programme.title: Design Ah! neo

programme.desc: Nobunaga finally conquers Mino, and Hanbei becomes a retainer of Tokichiro. Nobunaga accepts the request and marries his sister Ichi to Azai Nagamasa (Nakajima Ayumu) to secure peace, as Nagamasa could obstruct his march to the capital.

programme.title: Glaciers
programme.desc: Glaciers possess a very special kind of "power." They have acted as a catalyst for the birth and evolution of life on Earth. Glaciers are the source of human life and one of the most important partners in the Earth's climate system. However, due to global warming, glaciers are gradually disappearing. What, then, is happening to glaciers? This documentary explores what we must do to prevent the disappearance of glaciers, which may threaten the future of the Earth.

programme.title: 2026 New Taipei City Wan Jin Shi Marathon
programme.desc: The 2026 New Taipei City Wan Jin Shi Marathon will take place on March 15! As Taiwan's first road race to earn the World Athletics "Gold Label" certification, this event starts from Wanli and winds along the breathtaking North Coast toward Jinshan. Combining stunning ocean views with challenging terrain, it is hailed by runners as "Taiwan's Most Beautiful Coastal Marathon.

programme.title: Have a nice dream
programme.desc: There's a saying that "You can always get inspired by nature." Five outdoor enthusiasts-a cook, an athlete, a photographer, and two ecological experts-plan a two-day trip to enjoy the ultimate getaway in Taiwan. They share mysterious secret spots that have yet to be discovered, and places that are hard to access, featuring breathtaking mountain scenes and some of the bluest waters in the world. They also educate people on how to preserve Taiwan's beautiful and gifted environment.

programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 16
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Why Is He Still Single - EP 16
programme.desc: A quirky yet kind-hearted man, firmly against marriage, sparks humor and reflection as he navigates life. Despite his eccentricity, he finally meets the woman of his dreams and must decide how to win her heart.

programme.title: Dear Enemy - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. programme.title: Not Others - EP 12
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Dear Enemy - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: Dear Enemy - EP 3
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: IDOL I - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A tale unfolds around star attorney Maeng Se Na (Choi Soo Young), once a devoted longtime fan herself, who steps up to defend her idol Do Ra Ik (Kim Jae Young) after he is falsely accused of murder, setting off a chain of events that follows.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 2
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: If You Wish Upon Me - EP 13
programme.desc: Yoon Gyeo Rye lived at an orphanage, spent time in prison, and now struggles to lead a normal life. He volunteers at a hospice, where he works alongside volunteer team leader Kang Tae Sik and nurse Seo Yeon Joo. Despite his dark past and aggressive attitude, he unknowingly seeks comfort.

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2167
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 839
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 19
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wai-man and Wing-sum go with Wing-yan to file a report to the police. Wai-man eventually forgets about suing Sai-hang and his father as he wants to protect Wing-yan. Lik-to, in his capacity as Shuk-foon’s younger brother, launches a custody battle against Wai-man.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 27
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2167
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Hilarious Family - EP 4
programme.desc: This heartwarming drama tells the story of Du Ruyu (Liu Lin), a single mother who has been widowed for 18 years, raising her four daughters, each with very different personalities, on her own. The family is filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 839
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The Best Thing - EP 16
programme.desc: The gentle doctor He Suye and the severely insomniac hotel manager Shen Xifan, who repeatedly cross paths during daily life, gradually develop feelings for each other. In the end, they heal one another and embrace a love story filled with the fragrance of herbal medicine.

programme.title: The Best Thing - EP 17
programme.desc: The gentle doctor He Suye and the severely insomniac hotel manager Shen Xifan, who repeatedly cross paths during daily life, gradually develop feelings for each other. In the end, they heal one another and embrace a love story filled with the fragrance of herbal medicine.

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Big Biz Duel - EP 23
programme.desc: Sung Kiu slyly makes Ting Ning miss the shareholders’ meeting. Many shareholders are moved by Fong Fong’s speech. Sung Kiu does not intend to say anything. But Ting Ning arrives just in time, so Sung Kiu has to rally behind her by speaking. Eventually, Fong Fong is elected as MLC chairman.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 840
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2167
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 12
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 20
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sai-hang kidnaps Wing-sum and Yee-ting. Sai-hang demands a ransom of HK$10 million from Wai-man and warns him not to call the police. Wai-man and Yin-cho go the exchange location with the ransom. But they only see Yee-ting. Yin-cho gets hurt as he has a fight with Sai-hang.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 28
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2168
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Hilarious Family - EP 5
programme.desc: This heartwarming drama tells the story of Du Ruyu (Liu Lin), a single mother who has been widowed for 18 years, raising her four daughters, each with very different personalities, on her own. The family is filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 840
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The Silver Chamber Of Sorrows - EP 8
programme.desc: "Sheung’s Silver Chamber", the largest jewel company in Foshan, Guangdong Province China, is facing serious financial difficulties. In order to obtain a loan from SHUM’s family, SHEUNG HANG (Chun Pui), owner of the Chamber, together with his primary wife, CHOI SIU-DIP (Sit Ka Yin), plot to arrange marriage between SHEUNG WAN (Ng Wai Kwok), HANG’s younger brother, and SHUM WING-TUNG (Young Yuen Yee), daughter of SHUM’s family.

programme.title: Hong Kong Love Stories - EP 3
programme.desc: Nice guy designer Chan Tsz-long (Joey Law) and his idealist girlfriend Yau Hoi-kei (Katy Kung) are a typical Hong Kong couple reluctantly living an unsettled life due to land issues. Tsz-long’s two younger sisters Chan Tsz-yan (Venus Wong) and Chan Tsz-ting (Kayan Yau) are polar opposites. Photographer Tsz-yan keeps indulging in artist Ki Ka-hei’s (Brian Tse) decadent paradise. Well-behaved and diligent college goddess Tsz-ting adopts a realistic approach when she finds her first love.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 2
programme.desc: Financial elite, CHEUK YUK (Bosco Wong), never hesitates to use any dirty tricks to gain a profit, so he has been under close surveillance by the Commercial Crime Bureau (CCB). Being obsessed with money and power, CHEUK YUK constantly neglects his family members and friends. Because of him, his wife and mentor pass away respectively, yet he shows no remorse at all. On the contrary, his craving for money and power continuously increases.

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 3
programme.desc: Financial elite, CHEUK YUK (Bosco Wong), never hesitates to use any dirty tricks to gain a profit, so he has been under close surveillance by the Commercial Crime Bureau (CCB). Being obsessed with money and power, CHEUK YUK constantly neglects his family members and friends. Because of him, his wife and mentor pass away respectively, yet he shows no remorse at all. On the contrary, his craving for money and power continuously increases.

programme.title: The Legend Of Master Chai - EP 15
programme.desc: In Heaven, Chai (Leung Wing Chun) killed Huen (Ho Po Sang) over a pot of sweet lotus seed soup. He was expelled to earth to suffer, while at the same time, he had to help Huen and Nui, who were also sent down to earth, to regain their powers._x000D__x000D_Chai was punished to become the stupid and shabby son, of an earthly man. Huen, on the other hand, was his handsome and clever brother, who was loved by all. One day, Chai regained his magic power and started to challenge Huen.

programme.title: The Legend Of Master Chai - EP 16

programme.title: The Ultimate Addiction - EP 5
programme.desc: Bookshop staff FONG HOK MAN (Chun Pui) always believes that "knowledge is power". He tries hard to encourage his older son FONG SUM MING (Lai Yiu Cheung) and his younger son FONG SUM CHING (Suen Eric) to study more. Unfortunately, MING is not good at studying at all and he quits after secondary school. On the other hand, CHING is a very smart boy and MING works hard overseas to support CHING’s further studies on computer sciences in America.
